title: Singam Lyrics Singam Song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Singam
Singer : DSP & Megha

Everybody Listen Listen Listen
Make Way For The King
Everybody Listen Listen Listen
Just Watch The Way He Is Gonna Swing… Alright

Hei Vinnai Theendum Kathiravan
Endha Ellai Thaandum Kaatrivan
Kaattrai Erikum Neruppivan
Kai Pattal Kothikkum Neer Ivan

Everybody Listen He Is On A Mission
You Can Never Stop Him
He Is A Human Tornado
Everybody Listen He Has Got The Right Decision
You Cannot Mess With Him Not Even With His Shadow

Singam Singam He Is Durai Singam
Ivan Nadanthal Pothum Nilamum Vanangum
Hey..! Singam Singam He Is Durai Singam
Ayim Boothangal Yaavum Evanul Adangum

Hey! Roudigalin Raajiyangal Ranagalamai Irukkum… Irukkum
Kavalthurai Thaernthaetuthu Singathaithan Anuppum… Jeyikkum
Veeram… Athu Ithuthano
Soorum… Iru Vizhithano
Theeram… Aathu Evanthano
Mayavano…
Paarkam… Athu Padithano
Kaakum.. Iru Kaithano
Neekam.. Thani Vazhithano
Niranthara Bayam Ivano…(mg.com)
Singam Singam He Is Durai Singam .....

He can hunt you and make you even shiver
You can try to get him you wont you lose you cant
He is a leading power ....

Oh Oho Oho
Vagai Vagaiyayai Thavaru Seiyum Kayavargalai Arivaan Arivaan
Miga Migayai Kalavarama Pugai Enavey Nuzhaivaan Suduvaan
Sutham Iru Kaithano…
Ratham Oru Maithano…
Yutham Athu Meithano…(mg.com)
Porkalamo
Sutrum Puvi Evanthano..
Thattum Kadal Alaithano..
Mutrum Pagai Azhippano..
Maanidan Avan Evanno
Singam Singam He Is Durai Singam ....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Singam?

The song Singam conveys themes of strength and determination, portraying the protagonist as a powerful figure on a mission.

How does Singam fit into the movie's plot?

In Singam, the song serves as a motivational anthem that highlights the hero's journey and his relentless pursuit of justice.

Who are the artists behind Singam?

The song features vocals by Megha and Devi Sri Prasad, who is also the music director.

When was Singam released?

Singam was released on May 17, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Singam is a high-energy anthem that embodies the spirit of the protagonist in the movie Singam. It showcases themes of strength, determination, and resilience, making it a perfect motivational track. The powerful vocals of Megha combined with Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic music create an electrifying experience. This song evokes feelings of excitement and empowerment, making it ideal for celebrations and workouts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Singam is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the essence of determination and strength. With a unique collaboration between Megha's powerful vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition, this song is sure to get your adrenaline pumping. Dive into the world of Singam and experience the thrill of its infectious energy!
stanzaMeanings: Everybody listen, make way for the king. Just watch how he moves... Alright.
Hey, the one who brings light, the one who controls the wind, the one who is like fire, when he grabs, water will boil. He is that person.
Everybody listen, he is on a mission. You can never stop him; he is like a human tornado. Everybody listen, he has made the right choice. You cannot mess with him, not even with his shadow.
Singam, singam, he is Durai Singam. He is enough to make the land bow down. Hey..! Singam, singam, he is Durai Singam. All the spirits will bow down to him.

Hey! The kingdoms of the fierce will be in battle... The protective walls will be broken. The bravery that wins... Is this the way? Is it the end? Who is he? Let's see... Is he a trickster? Look, he will protect... He will remove the fear of being alone...
Singam, singam, he is Durai Singam...
He can hunt you and make you shiver. You can try to catch him, but you will lose; you can't. He is a leading power...
Oh, oh, oh, those who make mistakes will face consequences. He knows, he knows. He will bring great things without fail. He will shine brightly. Is he a warrior? Is it true?
Singam, singam, he is Durai Singam...
